title: Usopp's Courage Fails
description: Pages 11–15 focus on usopp's courage fails, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as sugar, Trebol, Usopp, Robin, and the Tontatta collide in the tower as the rescue plan begins to fail.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: My nose is running!!! The shot's hanging!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I won't die!! I... I don't have to listen to what a brat like you says!! Behehe!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: hurry up and get this sticky stuff off of...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What are you talking about? Hey, what's wrong with my body. Hurry up and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Stop chat- tering and get to work.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Why can't I go against his orders ....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Behehehe!! Nobody will even remember you anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Even I've already forgotten who you are.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: And now, you're going to work... or fight... for doffy until the day you die!!

dialogue.speaker: Sugar
dialogue.text: Hey!! What the!? This form!! I've been turned into a toy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Head for the final door and exit out to the harbor....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I'm a pirate. This has got to be a bad dream.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: They have to work here until they die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: ...so it turns out the weapons are smuggled out of here....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: but I can't go against them!! I can't do anything!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: To think this harbor was underground the whole time...!! But I can't even make contact with anyone...

dialogue.speaker: Koala
dialogue.text: Koala is waiting for a report. Won't I have even a moment of freedom!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I'm the King of PRODENSE!! Damn YOU DOFLAMINGO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: And now I'm a toy until I die!? You've got to be kidding. Somebody save me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sugar
dialogue.text: She loves grapes, so she's always eating them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: That's where our plan comes in!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: It's a lump of the world's spices spice, "Tatabababasco!!

dialogue.speaker: Sugar
dialogue.text: We made it look just like a grape.

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: So you're going to get sugar to...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: I'm going to place it in that basket!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: We experti- mented with it on 50 Contatta Tribe members.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: 100% lost conscious- mess, and 18 nearly died.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: We can have no mistakes, here!!

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: This has to make it to sugar!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: If a panic breaks out, I'll run away.

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: for when sugar's wail rings out...

summary: Usopp's Courage Fails focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as sugar, Trebol, Usopp, Robin, and the Tontatta collide in the tower as the rescue plan begins to fail.
